description: Reverb provides APIs and integrations for sellers on the Reverb music gear marketplace to manage listings, orders, payouts, messages, and shop settings. Its developer documentation is hosted at reverb-api.com, while the actual API endpoints are on api.reverb.com and sandbox.reverb.com.
summary: Reverb exposes documented REST APIs for production (`https://api.reverb.com/api`) and sandbox (`https://sandbox.reverb.com/api`), both using bearer personal access tokens and required version/media-type headers; no GraphQL, MCP, CLI, or machine-readable OpenAPI URL was found on this domain.
